final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original editorial illustration of a French romantic bedroom scene (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a 法式浪漫 aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs an elegant, languid framing — exact angle and crop are yours
Subject: must include a four-poster bed with sheer canopy drapes, a vintage 梳妆台, and scattered rose petals
Scene/backdrop: must include a 巴黎 street view visible through the window, morning light filtering in
Lighting/mood: needs a soft morning light atmosphere with an elegant and 慵懒 mood — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a romantic, soft direction — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs delicate sheer fabric and vintage surface treatments — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
